nasb.text: Thus says the Lord, “For three transgressions of Judah and for four I will not revoke its punishment, Because they rejected the law of the Lord And have not kept His statutes; Their lies also have led them astray, Those after which their fathers walked.

esv.text: Thus says the Lord: “For three transgressions of Judah, and for four, I will not revoke the punishment, because they have rejected the law of the Lord, and have not kept his statutes, but their lies have led them astray, those after which their fathers walked.

cnv.text: “耶和華這樣說： ‘猶大三番四次犯罪， 我必不收回懲罰他的命令； 因為他棄絕耶和華的律法， 不遵守他的典章； 反被他們列祖跟從的偶像， 使他們走錯了路。

ccb.text: 耶和华说： “犹大人三番四次地犯罪， 我必不收回对他们的惩罚， 因为他们厌弃耶和华的训诲， 不遵守我的律例。 他们祖先祭拜的偶像使他们走入歧途。
